elements.title: lang::report_page_046_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT kbi_c.id                                              courseid,
       kbi_c.fullname                                     AS course_name,
       kbi_u.id                                           AS userid,
       kbi_u.firstname,
       kbi_u.lastname,
       kbi_u.email,
       CASE
         WHEN MIN(comp.userid) IS NOT NULL AND MIN(kbi_ul.id) IS NOT NULL THEN 1
         ELSE 0 END                                   as completed,
       CASE
         WHEN MIN(comp.userid) IS NULL AND MIN(kbi_ul.id) IS NOT NULL THEN 1
         ELSE 0 END                                   as not_completed,
       CASE WHEN MIN(kbi_ul.id) IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as not_accessed
FROM mdl_role_assignments kbi_ra
       JOIN mdl_context kbi_ctx ON kbi_ctx.id = kbi_ra.contextid AND kbi_ctx.contextlevel = 50
       JOIN mdl_course kbi_c ON kbi_c.id = kbi_ctx.instanceid
       JOIN mdl_user kbi_u ON kbi_u.id = kbi_ra.userid
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_cm.course, kbi_cmc.userid
                  FROM mdl_course_modules kbi_cm
                         JOIN mdl_course_modules_completion kbi_cmc
                           ON kbi_cmc.coursemoduleid = kbi_cm.id AND kbi_cmc.completionstate = 1
                  WHERE kbi_cmc.id > 0
                  GROUP BY kbi_cm.course, kbi_cmc.userid) comp ON comp.userid = kbi_u.id AND comp.course = kbi_c.id
       LEFT JOIN mdl_user_lastaccess kbi_ul ON kbi_ul.courseid = kbi_c.id AND kbi_ul.userid = kbi_ra.userid
WHERE kbi_c.id > 0
  AND kbi_u.deleted = 0
  AND kbi_u.suspended = 0
  AND kbi_u.username != 'guest'
  AND kbi_c.visible = 1
  AND kbi_ra.roleid = 5
GROUP BY kbi_c.id, kbi_u.id
